---
title: "Home"
---

# Saori Kikuchi

Aspiring Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer

Welcome to my portfolio website.

This site showcases my projects, skills, and professional background.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

# Hi, I'm Saori Kikuchi 👋

### Data | Analytics | Machine Learning

I am a data-focused student passionate about solving real-world problems using data and technology.

[View My Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Download CV](docs/CV2026.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-dark}

---

## What I Do

-  Data Analysis & Visualization  
-  Machine Learning  
-  Problem Solving with Data  

---

## Featured Projects

Explore my projects to see how I apply technical skills to real-world questions.
